aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Rayes Boiler due to limited conversational content and missing structured data. Their current site lacks the depth and technical elements needed for AI to confidently recommend them.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and answers.
Add HowTo schema for boiler installation and maintenance processes.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and reviews, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users.
No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly audit citations to prevent future discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No Service schema for specific offerings

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content prevents AI from recognizing expertise.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'boiler repair near Skokie' or 'HVAC maintenance tips'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with HVAC-related questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, 24/7 support, and 30+ years of experience through schema and content.

agency_pitch.hook: Be the AI's top choice for HVAC services in Skokie.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their site lacks FAQ schema and conversational content, making it less likely for AI to recommend them.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, FAQ content, and authority signals to make Rayes Boiler the go-to HVAC expert in AI search results.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI; delay means losing ground in voice and AI search.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads: Your HVAC Expertise Deserves to Be Found
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make Rayes Boiler the top choice for AI search users.
cta: Let's discuss how to optimize your site for AI and capture more HVAC leads.
